positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of mystical bioluminescent flora and fauna intertwined with abstract geometric crystalline structures. The central composition features glowing celestial mandalas and stylized celestial beasts like phoenixes and koi fish, rendered in clean, thick silhouettes. Utilize a vibrant palette of deep indigo, electric sapphire, neon teal, and glowing gold accents. The overall style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau ornamentation, Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock prints, and modern vector art, ensuring strong outlines and solid color blocks suitable for screen printing. The design must be perfectly centered and scalable, with no edges touching the border.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, messy, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradient shading, complex skin texture, negative space, cartoonish, grunge, scratched
